event: View of the Moscow Kremlin in Winter
description: A watercolor cityscape depicting the Moscow Kremlin under a pale winter sky. A tall red-brick tower with a pointed green spire dominates the left foreground, with crenellated fortress walls extending from it. Beyond, golden onion domes of cathedrals and the tall white Ivan the Great Bell Tower rise against the overcast sky. Snow blankets the rooftops and grounds, and the lower foreground shows small structures with yellowish roofs amid the white expanse.
